verses.text: Our entrance was not in vain; we spake the gospel boldly, 'not as pleasing men, but God.' God-pleasing. He sought God's approval, not man's.
Our entrance was not in vain; we spake the gospel boldly, 'not as pleasing men, but God.' God-pleasing. He sought God's approval, not man's.
Our entrance was not in vain; we spake the gospel boldly, 'not as pleasing men, but God.' God-pleasing. He sought God's approval, not man's.
Our entrance was not in vain; we spake the gospel boldly, 'not as pleasing men, but God.' God-pleasing. He sought God's approval, not man's.
We used no flattery, but were gentle, 'as a nurse cherisheth her children,' imparting our own souls. Tender care. He loved them as a nursing mother.
We used no flattery, but were gentle, 'as a nurse cherisheth her children,' imparting our own souls. Tender care. He loved them as a nursing mother.
We used no flattery, but were gentle, 'as a nurse cherisheth her children,' imparting our own souls. Tender care. He loved them as a nursing mother.
We used no flattery, but were gentle, 'as a nurse cherisheth her children,' imparting our own souls. Tender care. He loved them as a nursing mother.
Ye remember our labour, working night and day; we exhorted you 'as a father doth his children.' Fatherly. He laboured and pleaded like a father.
Ye remember our labour, working night and day; we exhorted you 'as a father doth his children.' Fatherly. He laboured and pleaded like a father.
Ye remember our labour, working night and day; we exhorted you 'as a father doth his children.' Fatherly. He laboured and pleaded like a father.
Ye remember our labour, working night and day; we exhorted you 'as a father doth his children.' Fatherly. He laboured and pleaded like a father.
Ye received it 'not as the word of men, but... the word of God, which effectually worketh.' God's word. They received it as truly from God.
Ye received it 'not as the word of men, but... the word of God, which effectually worketh.' God's word. They received it as truly from God.
The Jews killed the Lord and forbid us to preach to the Gentiles; 'wrath is come.' Hardened foes. Their hostility hastens judgment.
The Jews killed the Lord and forbid us to preach to the Gentiles; 'wrath is come.' Hardened foes. Their hostility hastens judgment.
We longed to see you; ye are 'our hope, or joy, or crown of rejoicing.' Beloved crown. His converts are his joy and reward.
